sections.heading: TNM
sections.content: {"system": "All staging in this guideline is based on the 2009 FIGO surgical staging system and the AJCC Cancer Staging Manual, 8th Edition.", "t_stages": [{"stage": "TX", "description": "Primary tumor cannot be assessed."}, {"stage": "T0", "description": "No evidence of primary tumor."}, {"stage": "T1", "description": "Tumor confined to the corpus uteri, including endocervical glandular involvement."}, {"stage": "T1a", "description": "Tumor limited to the endometrium or invading less than half the myometrium."}, {"stage": "T1b", "description": "Tumor invading one half or more of the myometrium."}, {"stage": "T2", "description": "Tumor invading the stromal connective tissue of the cervix but not extending beyond the uterus. Does NOT include endocervical glandular involvement."}, {"stage": "T3", "description": "Tumor involving serosa, adnexa, vagina, or parametrium."}, {"stage": "T3a", "description": "Tumor involving the serosa and/or adnexa (direct extension or metastasis)."}, {"stage": "T3b", "description": "Vaginal involvement (direct extension or metastasis) or parametrial involvement."}, {"stage": "T4", "description": "Tumor invading the bladder mucosa and/or bowel mucosa (bullous edema is not sufficient to classify a tumor as T4)."}], "n_stages": [{"stage": "NX", "description": "Regional lymph nodes cannot be assessed."}, {"stage": "N0", "description": "No regional lymph node metastasis."}, {"stage": "N0(i+)", "description": "Isolated tumor cells in regional lymph node(s) no greater than 0.2 mm."}, {"stage": "N1", "description": "Regional lymph node metastasis to pelvic lymph nodes."}, {"stage": "N1mi", "description": "Regional lymph node metastasis (greater than 0.2 mm but not greater than 2.0 mm in diameter) to pelvic lymph nodes."}, {"stage": "N1a", "description": "Regional lymph node metastasis (greater than 2.0 mm in diameter) to pelvic lymph nodes."}, {"stage": "N2", "description": "Regional lymph node metastasis to para-aortic lymph nodes, with or without positive pelvic lymph nodes."}, {"stage": "N2mi", "description": "Regional lymph node metastasis (greater than 0.2 mm but not greater than 2.0 mm in diameter) to para-aortic lymph nodes, with or without positive pelvic lymph nodes."}, {"stage": "N2a", "description": "Regional lymph node metastasis (greater than 2.0 mm in diameter) to para-aortic lymph nodes, with or without positive pelvic lymph nodes."}], "m_stages": [{"stage": "M0", "description": "No distant metastasis."}, {"stage": "M1", "description": "Distant metastasis (includes metastasis to inguinal lymph nodes, intraperitoneal disease, lung, liver, or bone). It excludes metastasis to pelvic or para-aortic lymph nodes, vagina, uterine serosa, or adnexa."}], "stage_groups": [{"group": "Stage I", "criteria": "T1, N0, M0", "clinical_meaning": "Tumor confined to the corpus uteri.", "five_yr_survival": "Not explicitly stated in the source text for this group alone; varies by histology and grade.", "treatment_intent": "Curative."}, {"group": "Stage IA", "criteria": "T1a, N0, M0", "clinical_meaning": "Tumor limited to the endometrium or invading less than half the myometrium.", "five_yr_survival": "Excellent for low-grade endometrioid histology.", "treatment_intent": "Curative."}, {"group": "Stage IB", "criteria": "T1b, N0, M0", "clinical_meaning": "Tumor invading one half or more of the myometrium.", "five_yr_survival": "Varies by grade; worse for high-grade histologies.", "treatment_intent": "Curative."}, {"group": "Stage II", "criteria": "T2, N0, M0", "clinical_meaning": "Tumor invading cervical stroma but not beyond uterus.", "five_yr_survival": "Intermediate; influenced by grade and other factors.", "treatment_intent": "Curative."}, {"group": "Stage III", "criteria": "T3, N0, M0", "clinical_meaning": "Tumor involving serosa, adnexa, vagina, or parametrium.", "five_yr_survival": "Poor for high-grade histologies; better for low-grade endometrioid.", "treatment_intent": "Curative with multimodality therapy."}, {"group": "Stage IIIA", "criteria": "T3a, N0, M0", "clinical_meaning": "Tumor involving serosa and/or adnexa.", "five_yr_survival": "Variable.", "treatment_intent": "Curative."}, {"group": "Stage IIIB", "criteria": "T3b, N0, M0", "clinical_meaning": "Vaginal or parametrial involvement.", "five_yr_survival": "Variable.", "treatment_intent": "Curative."}, {"group": "Stage IIIC1", "criteria": "T1-T3, N1/N1mi/N1a, M0", "clinical_meaning": "Regional lymph node metastasis to pelvic lymph nodes.", "five_yr_survival": "Significantly worse than node-negative disease.", "treatment_intent": "Curative with systemic therapy ± radiation."}, {"group": "Stage IIIC2", "criteria": "T1-T3, N2/N2mi/N2a, M0", "clinical_meaning": "Regional lymph node metastasis to para-aortic lymph nodes, with or without positive pelvic nodes.", "five_yr_survival": "Worse than IIIC1.", "treatment_intent": "Curative with systemic therapy ± radiation."}, {"group": "Stage IVA", "criteria": "T4, Any N, M0", "clinical_meaning": ""}], "five_yr_survival": "Not explicitly stated for this group.", "treatment_intent": "Curative."}

t_stages.description: Tumor confined to the corpus uteri, including endocervical glandular involvement.
Tumor limited to the endometrium or invading less than half the myometrium.
Tumor invading one half or more of the myometrium.
Tumor invading the stromal connective tissue of the cervix but not extending beyond the uterus. Does NOT include endocervical glandular involvement.
Tumor involving serosa, adnexa, vagina, or parametrium.
Tumor involving the serosa and/or adnexa (direct extension or metastasis).
Vaginal involvement (direct extension or metastasis) or parametrial involvement.
Tumor invading the bladder mucosa and/or bowel mucosa (bullous edema is not sufficient to classify a tumor as T4).

n_stages.description: Regional lymph nodes cannot be assessed.
Isolated tumor cells in regional lymph node(s) no greater than 0.2 mm.
Regional lymph node metastasis to pelvic lymph nodes.
Regional lymph node metastasis (greater than 0.2 mm but not greater than 2.0 mm in diameter) to pelvic lymph nodes.
Regional lymph node metastasis (greater than 2.0 mm in diameter) to pelvic lymph nodes.
Regional lymph node metastasis to para-aortic lymph nodes, with or without positive pelvic lymph nodes.
Regional lymph node metastasis (greater than 0.2 mm but not greater than 2.0 mm in diameter) to para-aortic lymph nodes, with or without positive pelvic lymph nodes.
Regional lymph node metastasis (greater than 2.0 mm in diameter) to para-aortic lymph nodes, with or without positive pelvic lymph nodes.

m_stages.description: Distant metastasis (includes metastasis to inguinal lymph nodes, intraperitoneal disease, lung, liver, or bone). It excludes metastasis to pelvic or para-aortic lymph nodes, vagina, uterine serosa, or adnexa.
